webApp.description: AI-powered cocktail recipe generator that creates personalized drink recommendations based on your mood, ingredients, and equipment.

home.name: How to Create Cocktails with MIXR
home.description: Get started generating personalized cocktail recipes with MIXR's AI-powered mixology platform.

steps.name: Set Up Your Bar
steps.text: Tell MIXR what equipment and ingredients you have at home so it can suggest recipes you can actually make.

steps.name: Choose Your Mood
steps.text: Select how you're feeling today. MIXR will recommend cocktails that match your vibe.

steps.name: Generate a Recipe
steps.text: Let the AI create a personalized cocktail recipe based on your mood, equipment, and available ingredients.

steps.name: Mix and Enjoy
steps.text: Follow the step-by-step instructions to craft your perfect cocktail. Rate it and share with the community!
